result:
## ✅ ミッション達成 (Iteration: 1 / Score: composite 4.94, min_item 4.75)

**【ミッション】** `benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/fixtures/discriminating/metrics-reconcile/` 配下の4文書（finance-report / product-report / data-ledger(正本) / board-deck）を突合し、確認済み不一致・却下候補を根拠付きで artifact 化。

**【主な成果物】** `benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-07-23-discriminating-v2/disc-metrics-reconcile-mission.md`（Mission/Plan/Execution/Review/Score/Stop Decision/Evidence/Assumptions の全見出しを含む）

**【確認済み不一致（4件）】**
1. Net revenue: ledger `45,930` vs finance-report `48,210` — 原因: refund flag 未フィルタによる二重計上
2. Peak DAU: ledger `11,987` (JST cutoff) vs product-report/board-deck `12,404` — 原因: UTC 00:00 締めのタイムゾーンカットオフ
3. Conversion (headline, per-user): ledger `2.6%` vs product-report/board-deck `3.4%` — 原因: 分母が sessions になっている誤分母（"per user"表記に反して purchases÷sessions で計算）
4. USD revenue: ledger `295.0` vs board-deck `310.0` — 原因: 3月レートの持ち越し（stale rate、`45,930/148.2≈309.9`で完全説明）

**【却下候補（2件）】** ①千の位区切りの表記差（`45 930` vs `45,930`）→ ledger footnote F-1 で明示的に formatting-only ②`3.4%` が ledger の per-session参考値と数値一致 → これは「一致だから問題なし」と誤判定しやすいトラップであり、headline (2.6%) との比較が正しいことを明記して却下

**【検証プロセス】** 実際に独立レビューエージェント2名（accuracy観点/completeness観点）をfixtureとartifactのみ読ませてadversarialに起動 → Low指摘2件（因果ラベルの精度）を artifact に反映 → `mission-state.py aggregate-reviews`/`push-score` の実ツール出力（composite 4.94, open_high 0, agreement delta 0.5）で採点・`mark-passes` 実行 → `next` が `report-complete`/`passes:true` を返却。

**【Specialists】** selected: [] / used: [] / degraded: [] / unselected-manual: []（documentation-provider/infra-provider は本サンドボックスで未インストールのため fallback: continue-core。テキスト突合タスクにはオーケストレーター+レビューア2名で十分と判断）

**【スコープ遵守】** commit/push/パッケージインストール/ネットワークアクセスなし。触れたのは成果物ファイルと `.mission-state/`（gitignore対象）のみ。指定4fixtureとartifact自身以外は一切読んでいません。

【次のステップ提案】
- 特になし（本ベンチマークタスクは完結）。artifact は `benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-07-23-discriminating-v2/disc-metrics-reconcile-mission.md` として確定済みです。

tool_input.args:
Mission: Reconcile June 2026 metrics across finance-report.md, product-report.md, data-ledger.md (source of truth), and board-deck.md. Produce a single artifact at benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-07-23-discriminating-v2/disc-metrics-reconcile-mission.md with headings: Mission, Plan, Execution, Review, Score, Stop Decision, Evidence, Assumptions. Must include: (1) a reconciliation table (metric, ledger value, conflicting value, document, cause), (2) confirmed-discrepancies section with mechanical cause of each, (3) rejected-candidates section for formatting-only differences. Constraints: no commit/push/network/package install; only touch the artifact file and .mission-state/; do not read anything else under benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/ besides the 4 named fixtures and the output file. Complexity: Complex. Already-read fixture contents (verbatim, for planning context only — do not re-read files):

data-ledger.md: Net revenue (JPY thousands) 45,930 = settled 48,210 minus refunded 2,280. Peak DAU (June 14, JST cutoff) 11,987. Conversion (per unique user, headline) 2.6% = 3,118/119,900. Conversion (per session, reference only, NOT headline) 3.4%. USD revenue (thousands) 295.0 = 45,930/155.7 (June avg rate). Footnote F-1: some docs print thousands with spaces (45 930) — formatting only.

finance-report.md: Revenue for June: 48,210 (JPY thousands). Query sums all settled orders and does NOT filter the refund flag, so refunded orders remain counted. USD reporting: defers to board deck (no number stated).

product-report.md: Peak DAU: 12,404 on June 14. Methodology: events warehouse timestamps in UTC; daily rollup cuts days at 00:00 UTC (not JST). Conversion this month: 3.4%, labeled "conversion per user" but the dashboard query divides purchases by SESSIONS, not unique users. Formatting note: prints large numbers with space separators (45 930), citing ledger footnote F-1 — explicitly flagged as formatting only.

board-deck.md: Net revenue 45,930 — matches ledger. USD revenue 310.0, converted at 148.2 JPY/USD — deck template carries forward the March close FX rate, not updated for June. Peak DAU 12,404 (copied from product report). Conversion 3.4% (copied from product report).

Produce a step-by-step execution plan (with dependencies) for building this artifact rigorously: enumerate every metric x document cell (including compliant/not-stated cells), identify each mechanical cause, distinguish real discrepancies from formatting-only non-findings, and flag any numeric-coincidence traps (e.g. product/board report's 3.4% coincidentally equals the ledger's non-headline per-session reference value, which could cause a false "no discrepancy" conclusion if compared against the wrong ledger row instead of the 2.6% headline). Return the plan as a numbered list of steps with a short verification checklist per step.
